_model_options: resnet18 | vgg11 | alexnet | mobilenetv2 | lenet5 | deit_tiny | mlp
_selector_note: GAS overrides selection internally via G-score ranking; this is the fallback for warmup rounds
_g_measure_frequency_note: Compute G-scores every N rounds (higher = less overhead)
_v_test_batches_note: Number of test batches for V-value gradient estimation
_warmup_rounds_note: Use uniform selection for first N rounds before G data is available
_oracle_max_batches_note: Limit oracle computation to N batches (null = use all test data)
